Public, coeducational school in Youngstown, Ohio, United States

**Liberty High School** is a public [high school](/wiki/High_school "High school") in [Liberty Township](/wiki/Liberty_Township,_Trumbull_County,_Ohio "Liberty Township, Trumbull County, Ohio"), near [Youngstown, Ohio](/wiki/Youngstown,_Ohio "Youngstown, Ohio"). It is the only high school in the [Liberty Local School District](/wiki/Liberty_Local_Schools "Liberty Local Schools"). Athletic teams are known as the Leopards, and they compete as a member of the [Ohio High School Athletic Association](/wiki/Ohio_High_School_Athletic_Association "Ohio High School Athletic Association") in the [Mahoning Valley Athletic Conference](/wiki/Mahoning_Valley_Athletic_Conference "Mahoning Valley Athletic Conference").

## Athletics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Liberty_High_School_(Ohio)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Athletics")]

### State championships

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Liberty_High_School_(Ohio)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: State championships")]

Further information: [Ohio High School Athletic Association](/wiki/Ohio_High_School_Athletic_Association "Ohio High School Athletic Association")

* Boys cross country – 1975
* Girls track and field – 1978[[3]](#cite_note-Ohio_High_School_Athletic_Association-3)

## Notable alumni

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Liberty_High_School_(Ohio)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Notable alumni")]

* [Amy Acton](/wiki/Amy_Acton "Amy Acton") - former director of the [Ohio Department of Health](/wiki/Ohio_Department_of_Health "Ohio Department of Health")
* [Jerry DePizzo](/wiki/Jerry_DePizzo "Jerry DePizzo") - musician in [O.A.R.](/wiki/O.A.R._(band) "O.A.R. (band)")
* [Bob DiPiero](/wiki/Bob_DiPiero "Bob DiPiero") - country music song writer
* [Bradley Fletcher](/wiki/Bradley_Fletcher "Bradley Fletcher") - former professional football player in the [National Football League](/wiki/National_Football_League "National Football League") (NFL)
* [Dave Malkoff](/wiki/Dave_Malkoff "Dave Malkoff") - [CBS News](/wiki/CBS_News "CBS News") National Correspondent
* [Fitzgerald Toussaint](/wiki/Fitzgerald_Toussaint "Fitzgerald Toussaint") - former professional football player in the [National Football League](/wiki/National_Football_League "National Football League") (NFL)[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Jimmy Weller III](/wiki/Jimmy_Weller_III "Jimmy Weller III") - former [NASCAR](/wiki/NASCAR "NASCAR") driver[[5]](#cite_note-5)
